languages.text: "Я получи{mf|л|ла} послание от Тразина. В обмен на Патент он хочет тебя".
"I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."
languages.original_text: "Я получи{mf|л|ла} послание от Тразина. В обмен на Патент он хочет тебя".

traits.locale_text: "I received a message from Trazyn.He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."
"I received a message from Trazyn.He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."
"I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."
"I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."
"I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."

languages.text: “我收到了特拉金的消息。他想用贸易授状把你换回去。”
languages.original_text: "I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: “我收到了特拉金的消息。他想用贸易授状把你换回去。”

languages.text: «He recibido un mensaje de Trazyn. Quiere intercambiarle por la Patente».
languages.original_text: "I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: «He recibido un mensaje de Trazyn. Quiere intercambiarle por la Patente».

languages.text: « J'ai reçu un message de Trazyn. Il veut que je vous livre en échange de la lettre. »
languages.original_text: "I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai reçu un message de Trazyn. Il veut que je vous livre en échange de la lettre. »

languages.text: "Trazyn'den bir mesaj aldım. Ruhsatname karşılığında seni istiyor."
languages.original_text: "I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: "Trazyn'den bir mesaj aldım. Ruhsatname karşılığında seni istiyor."

languages.text: "Ich habe eine Nachricht von Trazyn erhalten. Er will Euch im Tausch gegen den Handelsbrief."
languages.original_text: "I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe eine Nachricht von Trazyn erhalten. Er will Euch im Tausch gegen den Handelsbrief."

languages.text: 「トラズンからメッセージが届いた。彼は、ワラントと引き換えに君を欲しがっている」
languages.original_text: "I received a message from Trazyn. He wants you in exchange for the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: 「トラズンからメッセージが届いた。彼は、ワラントと引き換えに君を欲しがっている」
